_description: Viral Influencer Trend Reference Group — 10 public creator accounts studied collectively as one benchmark pool for viral travel, lifestyle, ocean, adventure, and storytelling content.
_folder_key: viral_reference_group (physical name kept stable — do not rename folders or config keys)
_purpose: Study viral influencer content, trend formats, and content structures that Avalon Escapes can adapt or recreate. Social media is trend-based — the goal is not to avoid replication entirely. Understand what can be replicated safely and strategically.
_ethics_rule: Avalon can replicate trend formats and content structures, but must never copy exact captions, scripts, footage, personal stories, signature phrases, or creator identity. All ideas must be transformed into Avalon's own voice, footage, destinations, and brand angle.
_rules: Treat all 10 accounts as ONE collective reference pool, not as individual creators
Raw data is stored per-account for clean re-collection, but analysis always uses the combined group dataset
Data saved to data/raw/viral_reference_group/{username}/ — NEVER mixed with founder or brand data
Always ask for credit confirmation before scraping
Goal: extract the STRUCTURE and TREND FORMATS behind what works, not the content itself
Follower count is used as a confidence/authority layer, not as the only ranking factor
Small creator + very viral post = strong pattern. Large creator + average post = useful but not automatically top pattern.

_classification_tiers.1_direct_trend_adaptation: Format is already trend-based — recreate directly with Avalon footage, voice, destinations, captions, and brand angle. (POV formats, send-this-to formats, transition trends, audio trends, list Reels, travel reminders, keyword CTAs, invitation formats)
_classification_tiers.2_structural_replication: Replicate the structure (hook formula, emotional arc, pacing, caption shape, CTA style) but NOT exact words, footage, creator identity, or personal story.
_classification_tiers.3_inspiration_only: Do not copy — too unique to the creator, too personal, or too close to their brand identity. Use only as directional inspiration. (Personal manifestos, signature phrases, private experiences, unique editing identity)

viral_reference_group.label: Viral Influencer Trend Reference Group
viral_reference_group.purpose: Collective benchmark for viral travel / lifestyle / ocean / adventure / storytelling / agency content — trend identification and safe adaptation for Avalon Escapes

accounts.why_relevant_to_avalon: Highest viral coefficient in the group (160× average on top post). Ultra-short cinematic hooks + philosophical essay format directly applicable to Avalon's premium storytelling voice.
accounts.best_avalon_opportunity: Ultra-Short Cinematic Hook + Philosophical Essay Reel
accounts.notes: Most viral creator in the group (53M plays, 1.6M likes on top post). Signature phrase 'That’s what they call it at least…' is TIER 3 — do not copy. The structural approach is fully Tier 2.

accounts.why_relevant_to_avalon: Ocean and diving content directly mirrors Avalon’s Maldives/ocean positioning. Top post uses keyword CTA format (194× average) — the strongest keyword CTA example in the group. Direct overlap with Avalon’s ocean adventures.
accounts.best_avalon_opportunity: Keyword CTA Guide (DM/Comment for Fuvahmulah or Maldives guide)
accounts.notes: Top post: 'dm me the word GUIDE for my full guide on everything Okinawa' — 194× his average. Ocean niche is the most direct Avalon overlap in the group.

accounts.niche: Cultural travel, Latin America & human connection stories
accounts.why_relevant_to_avalon: Brazil/Latin America content + human connection storytelling closely mirrors Rafa’s background and Avalon’s Latin American positioning. Country love declaration format (10M plays, 1M likes on Brazil post).
accounts.best_avalon_opportunity: Country / Destination Love Declaration (Colombia, Brazil, Maldives)
accounts.notes: BRASIL post: 10M plays, 1M likes — the country love declaration format is Tier 1 and directly applicable to Avalon's destinations. Human moment stories are Tier 3 (deeply personal).

accounts.why_relevant_to_avalon: Premium visual aesthetic and ultra-short cinematic caption style applicable to Avalon’s luxury positioning. Highest single-post likes in the dataset (247K). Shows what premium brevity looks like.
accounts.best_avalon_opportunity: Ultra-Short Hook + Cinematic Visual (requires extraordinary footage)
accounts.notes: Highest single-post likes in group (247K on 'Nor(cole)man Rockwell'). Very art-forward — less directly applicable than ocean/adventure creators. Caption style is Tier 1, personal identity is Tier 3.

accounts.niche: Off-the-beaten-path adventure travel (conflict zones, extreme destinations)
accounts.why_relevant_to_avalon: Ultra-short cinematic hooks, curiosity-gap format, and underrated destination reveals. Structure is highly replicable for Avalon’s lesser-known destinations (Fuvahmulah, Providencia, Türkiye beyond Istanbul).
accounts.best_avalon_opportunity: Underrated / Overlooked Destination Reveal + Curiosity-Gap Hook
accounts.notes: Top posts: 'The Disneyland of Iran' (41× average), 'The city that time forgot' (Chernobyl). Pop-culture comparison formula is his signature — abstract it, do not copy directly.

accounts.why_relevant_to_avalon: Philosophical essay format and 'travel is more than checking places off a list' messaging is closely aligned with Avalon’s brand voice. Structural replication of caption arc is very applicable.
accounts.best_avalon_opportunity: Philosophical Essay Reel (caption structure, not exact text)
accounts.notes: Caption arc ('It’s not about crossing places off a list 🗺️ It’s so much more than that…') is a fully replicable Tier 2 structure for Avalon’s voice.

accounts.niche: Couples lifestyle, slow travel & European city life
accounts.why_relevant_to_avalon: Couples/romantic travel format relevant for Avalon’s honeymoon and romantic escape packages. Milestone narrative structure ('a year ago today, barcelona went dark' — 2.4M plays).
accounts.best_avalon_opportunity: Milestone / Journey Narrative (founding story, anniversary trip)
accounts.notes: Top post: 'a year ago today, barcelona went dark… and somehow… we felt more connected than ever' (2.4M plays). Romantic milestone narrative is Tier 2 — highly applicable for Avalon honeymoon/couples content.

accounts.niche: Solo female adventure travel & group trip hosting
accounts.why_relevant_to_avalon: Strongest keyword CTA and trip invitation performance in the group (39× and 40× averages). Trip invitation + keyword CTA format is directly applicable to Avalon’s group departures and guided escape offers.
accounts.best_avalon_opportunity: Trip Invitation Format + Keyword CTA (for Avalon group departures)
accounts.notes: Top posts use trip invitation (39× avg) and keyword CTA ('comment HIKETRIP' — 40× avg). Journey narrative ('a year and a half ago i left to solo travel') is Tier 2. Very actionable for Avalon agency model.

accounts.why_relevant_to_avalon: Highest raw viral numbers (102M plays). Expectation subversion, destination love declarations, and philosophical transformation narratives all consistently viral. Broadest viral range in the group.
accounts.best_avalon_opportunity: Expectation Subversion + Destination Love Declaration (for Avalon’s misunderstood destinations)
accounts.notes: Top posts: spider cobweb video (102M plays), Bangladesh train story (72× avg). Expectation subversion formula is Tier 2 — directly applicable. Personal transformation stories are Tier 3.

accounts.why_relevant_to_avalon: MOST DIRECTLY COMPARABLE to Avalon. Only other boutique agency in the group. Two-founder format, trip invitations, agency storytelling. Study everything from them as a direct structural reference.
accounts.best_avalon_opportunity: Founder Personality Dynamic + Trip Invitation (Rafa vs Sofia format)
accounts.notes: Top posts: NOS VAMOS A UN PARAISO (20× avg), personality debates (3.87×–5.1× avg). Spanish-language — do not copy phrasing. The two-founder format and agency trip invitation structure are Tier 1 for Avalon.

accounts.why_relevant_to_avalon: Useful for studying emotional travel storytelling, lifestyle-led destination framing, and aspirational but personal content formats that can be adapted into Avalon's premium travel voice.
accounts.best_avalon_opportunity: Emotional Travel Storytelling + Lifestyle Destination Framing
accounts.notes: Study hooks, caption style, visual pacing, emotional angles, and travel formats that feel personal but still polished. No raw data collected yet — add via scripts/05_collect_references.py.

accounts.niche: Travel guides, destination inspiration & carousel content
accounts.why_relevant_to_avalon: PRIMARY CAROUSEL REFERENCE in the group. Especially useful for studying carousel formats, destination guides, saveable posts, list-style travel content, itinerary carousels, and practical travel inspiration that can be adapted for Avalon packages.
accounts.best_avalon_opportunity: Destination Guide Carousel + Itinerary Carousel (Maldives, Colombia, Sri Lanka packages)
accounts.notes: PRIMARY CAROUSEL REFERENCE. Give special attention to: carousel structure, slide sequencing, first-slide hooks, save/share triggers, destination guide formats, and carousel CTAs. No raw data collected yet — add via scripts/05_collect_references.py.

collection_settings.note: 25 posts per account for initial pattern analysis. Increase to 50 for deeper historical view.

_how_to_add_new_creators: Add new creator handles to config/new_reference_creators_to_add.json. When ready to collect data, move the entry into this file under viral_reference_group.accounts and run scripts/05_collect_references.py followed by scripts/06_analyze_references.py.
_follower_count_note: follower_count defaults to null. Update manually from each creator's public Instagram profile. Used as a confidence/authority layer in the reference strength score — not as the sole ranking factor.
